Our Services

Artificial Intelligence

Intelligent chatbots, recommendation systems and predictive analytics that automate processes and power data-driven decisions.

Mobile App Development

High-quality custom apps built with React Native — the framework behind Facebook, Instagram and UberEats.

GPS Tracking Systems

Real-time location, route optimization and performance insights to track and manage assets with ease.

Point of Sale Systems

Smart, reliable POS for retail and hospitality with smooth sales, inventory tracking and real-time reporting.

Marketing Services

Tailored campaigns, content and branding that increase visibility, attract leads and grow your market presence.

Storage & Fulfilment

End-to-end fulfilment with accurate inventory management, fast packing and reliable shipping.

Our Projects

Selected Work

GPS Tracking

Emirates Transport

A customized GPS tracking solution for one of the largest government-owned transport providers in the UAE — real-time tracking, route optimization and fleet management across thousands of vehicles.

POS System

UAE Ministry of Interior

A secure, scalable retail POS system with advanced transaction management, inventory tracking and multi-branch control — meeting the strict security standards of a government entity.

POS System

Shurooq Investment

A fully integrated POS system across visitor centers, retail branches and hospitality points — supporting premier investment, tourism and lifestyle destinations across Sharjah.
